sentences.arabic: السُّوقُ الْعَرَبِيُّ مَكَانٌ مُمْتِعٌ يَبِيعُ فِيهِ التُّجَّارُ أَنْوَاعًا كَثِيرَةً مِنَ الْبَضَائِعِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska pijaca je ugodno mjesto gdje trgovci prodaju razne vrste robe.
sentences.translationEn: The Arab souk is a lively place where merchants sell many kinds of goods.

sentences.arabic: تَجِدُ فِيهِ الْتَّوَابِلَ وَالسِّجَادَ وَالْمَجَوْهَرَاتِ وَالْمَلَابِسَ.
sentences.translation: Tu možete naći začine, tepihe, nakit i odjeću.
sentences.translationEn: You can find spices, carpets, jewellery, and clothing there.

sentences.arabic: يَتَفَاوَضُ الْبَائِعُ وَالْمُشْتَرِي عَلَى السِّعْرِ وَهَذَا جُزْءٌ مِنَ الْمُتْعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Prodavač i kupac pregovaraju o cijeni, što je dio zabave.
sentences.translationEn: The seller and buyer negotiate over the price, which is part of the fun.

sentences.arabic: رَائِحَةُ الْبَهَارَاتِ وَالْبُخُورِ تَمْلَأُ أَزِقَّةَ السُّوقِ الضَّيِّقَةَ.
sentences.translation: Miris začina i tamjana ispunjava uske ulice pijace.
sentences.translationEn: The smell of spices and incense fills the narrow alleyways of the market.
